overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction RPG showing a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial office space with cubicles and exposed piping. The character walks through the office, pauses at a back wall with skylights, approaches an NPC working at a computer station, observes them briefly, then walks away toward a corridor.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial office space between cubicle partitions

entered.detail: beige and white cubicle walls with black trim
large cylindrical metal pipe running vertically along the wall
industrial metal flooring with visible seams and wear patterns
exposed industrial piping and ductwork on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial office space with cubicles on either side. Large ventilation pipes run along the walls and ceiling, and the metal flooring shows signs of wear. The environment has a cool, metallic color palette with mixed lighting from overhead fixtures and distant windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: back wall with skylights and damaged concrete

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the back wall to observe the skylight area
character turns and begins walking toward the NPC workstation

agents.ego_description: standing at the back wall looking up at the skylights, then turning toward the NPC

notable_agents.action: seated at desk working on computer, visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered concrete wall with visible bullet holes and damage marks
angled skylight windows allowing natural light to enter from above
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near the wall
elevated metal walkway with safety railing

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back wall of the office where natural light streams through angled skylights. The concrete wall shows signs of damage and wear. Cardboard boxes are stacked nearby, and a metal catwalk runs along the left side. The character pauses to observe the area before turning toward an NPC working at a desk.

events.description: character stops next to the NPC and stands observing them work at the computer

agents.ego_description: standing beside the NPC's desk watching them type on the computer

notable_agents.action: seated at desk typing on computer, occasionally looking at the screen

entered.detail: office desk with papers and equipment where the NPC is seated
two computer screens displaying data and text
black office chair with the NPC seated in it
tall metal filing cabinet with multiple drawers

segments.scene_description: The character stands next to an NPC who is working at a computer station. The desk is cluttered with papers and equipment, and dual monitors display glowing text. The area is lit by artificial light, and a filing cabinet stands against the nearby wall. The NPC continues typing while the character observes.

events.description: character turns and walks away from the NPC toward the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: walking away from the NPC workstation back toward the office entrance and corridor

entered.detail: doorway leading to a lit corridor in the distance
white storage cabinets against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the NPC and walks back through the office toward a distant corridor. The path leads past storage cabinets and cubicles toward a lit exit. The environment returns to the artificial lighting of the main office floor as the character departs the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial office that shifts from a cold, metallic interior toward a pocket of natural light before returning to the artificial glow of the workspace. It begins by following the character through a corridor of cubicles and exposed ventilation pipes, moving across worn metal flooring under cool overhead lighting. As the character reaches the back of the room, the scene opens up to reveal angled skylights casting natural light onto damaged concrete walls and stacked cardboard boxes. The camera then shifts focus toward an NPC at a cluttered computer station, lingering on the glowing monitors and artificial desk lighting before the character turns away. Finally, the view recedes back through the office, passing storage cabinets and cubicles as the character departs toward a lit corridor.
